subcodes.title: Letter to Mirza Hasan-i-Khurasani
subcodes.first_line: Read thou the Book wherein is remembered the Name of thy Lord, He besides Whom there is no God, the Most Exalted, the All-Wise. Verily it is a Book sent down from the presence of the Remnant of God, the true Imam [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اقرء کتاب ذکر اسم ربک الذی لا اله الا هو العلی الحکیم و انه لکتاب قد تنزل من لدن بقیة الله امام حق
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
